message.expr: "cannot verify unlogged index \"%s\" during recovery, skipping"
message.text: cannot verify unlogged index "%s" during recovery, skipping

call:
ereport(NOTICE,
			(errcode(ERRCODE_READ_ONLY_SQL_TRANSACTION),
			 errmsg("cannot verify unlogged index \"%s\" during recovery, skipping",
					RelationGetRelationName(rel))))

message.expr: "could not open parent table of index \"%s\""
message.text: could not open parent table of index "%s"

				(errcode(ERRCODE_UNDEFINED_TABLE),
				 errmsg("could not open parent table of index \"%s\"",
						RelationGetRelationName(indrel))))

ereport(ERROR,
				(errcode(ERRCODE_WRONG_OBJECT_TYPE),
				 errmsg("expected index as targets for verification"),
				 errdetail_relkind_not_supported(rel->rd_rel->relkind)))

message.text: expected "%s" index as targets for verification

call:

				 errmsg("expected \"%s\" index as targets for verification", get_am_name(am_id)),
				 errdetail("Relation \"%s\" is a %s index.",
						   RelationGetRelationName(rel), get_am_name(rel->rd_rel->relam))))

message.expr: "cannot access temporary tables of other sessions"
message.text: cannot access temporary tables of other sessions

				(errcode(ERRCODE_FEATURE_NOT_SUPPORTED),
				 errmsg("cannot access temporary tables of other sessions"),
				 errdetail("Index \"%s\" is associated with temporary relation.",
						   RelationGetRelationName(rel))))

ereport(ERROR,
				(errcode(ERRCODE_OBJECT_NOT_IN_PREREQUISITE_STATE),
				 errmsg("cannot check index \"%s\"",
						RelationGetRelationName(rel)),
				 errdetail("Index is not valid.")))

message.expr: "number of items mismatch in GIN entry tuple, %d in tuple header, %d decoded"
message.text: number of items mismatch in GIN entry tuple, %d in tuple header, %d decoded

call:
elog(ERROR, "number of items mismatch in GIN entry tuple, %d in tuple header, %d decoded",
					 nipd, ndecoded)
elog(DEBUG3, "processing posting tree at blk %u", posting_tree_root)
elog(DEBUG1, "page blk: %u, type leaf", stack->blkno)

message.expr: "index \"%s\": internal pages traversal encountered leaf page unexpectedly on block %u"
message.text: index "%s": internal pages traversal encountered leaf page unexpectedly on block %u

call:
ereport(ERROR,
						(errcode(ERRCODE_INDEX_CORRUPTED),
						 errmsg("index \"%s\": internal pages traversal encountered leaf page unexpectedly on block %u",
								RelationGetRelationName(rel), stack->blkno)))

elog(DEBUG3, "blk %u: parent %u highkey (%u, %u), %s",
					 stack->blkno,
					 stack->parentblk,
					 ItemPointerGetBlockNumberNoCheck(&stack->parentkey),
					 ItemPointerGetOffsetNumberNoCheck(&stack->parentkey),
					 tidrange_buf)

elog(DEBUG3, "blk %u: root leaf, %s",
					 stack->blkno,
					 tidrange_buf)

message.expr: "index \"%s\": tid exceeds parent's high key in postingTree leaf on block %u"
message.text: index "%s": tid exceeds parent's high key in postingTree leaf on block %u

call:
ereport(ERROR,
						(errcode(ERRCODE_INDEX_CORRUPTED),
						 errmsg("index \"%s\": tid exceeds parent's high key in postingTree leaf on block %u",
								RelationGetRelationName(rel), stack->blkno)))
elog(DEBUG1, "page blk: %u, type data, maxoff %d", stack->blkno, maxoff)

message.expr: "index \"%s\" has unexpected pd_lower %u in posting tree block %u with maxoff %u)"
message.text: index "%s" has unexpected pd_lower %u in posting tree block %u with maxoff %u)

call:
ereport(ERROR,
						(errcode(ERRCODE_INDEX_CORRUPTED),
						 errmsg("index \"%s\" has unexpected pd_lower %u in posting tree block %u with maxoff %u)",
								RelationGetRelationName(rel), pd_lower, stack->blkno, maxoff)))

message.expr: "index \"%s\": posting tree page's high key (%u, %u) doesn't match the downlink on block %u (parent blk %u, key (%u, %u))"
message.text: index "%s": posting tree page's high key (%u, %u) doesn't match the downlink on block %u (parent blk %u, key (%u, %u))

call:
ereport(ERROR,
						(errcode(ERRCODE_INDEX_CORRUPTED),
						 errmsg("index \"%s\": posting tree page's high key (%u, %u) doesn't match the downlink on block %u (parent blk %u, key (%u, %u))",
								RelationGetRelationName(rel),
								ItemPointerGetBlockNumberNoCheck(&bound),
								ItemPointerGetOffsetNumberNoCheck(&bound),
								stack->blkno, stack->parentblk,
								ItemPointerGetBlockNumberNoCheck(&stack->parentkey),
								ItemPointerGetOffsetNumberNoCheck(&stack->parentkey))))

message.expr: "index \"%s\" contains unexpected zero page at block %u"
message.text: index "%s" contains unexpected zero page at block %u

				 errmsg("index \"%s\" contains unexpected zero page at block %u",
						RelationGetRelationName(rel),
						BufferGetBlockNumber(buffer)),
				 errhint("Please REINDEX it.")))

				 errhint("Please REINDEX it.")))

message.expr: "line pointer points past end of tuple space in index \"%s\""
message.text: line pointer points past end of tuple space in index "%s"

call:
ereport(ERROR,
				(errcode(ERRCODE_INDEX_CORRUPTED),
				 errmsg("line pointer points past end of tuple space in index \"%s\"",
						RelationGetRelationName(rel)),
				 errdetail_internal("Index tid=(%u,%u) lp_off=%u, lp_len=%u lp_flags=%u.",
									block, offset, ItemIdGetOffset(itemid),
									ItemIdGetLength(itemid),
									ItemIdGetFlags(itemid))))

ereport(ERROR,
				(errcode(ERRCODE_INVALID_PARAMETER_VALUE),
				 errmsg("invalid skip option"),
				 errhint("Valid skip options are \"all-visible\", \"all-frozen\", and \"none\".")))

message.expr: "finished verifying presence of " INT64_FORMAT " tuples from table \"%s\" with bitset %.2f%% set"

ereport(DEBUG1,
				(errmsg_internal("finished verifying presence of " INT64_FORMAT " tuples from table \"%s\" with bitset %.2f%% set",
								 state->heaptuplespresent, RelationGetRelationName(heaprel),
								 100.0 * bloom_prop_bits_set(state->filter))))

message.expr: "index uniqueness can not be checked for index tid=(%u,%u) in index \"%s\""
message.text: index uniqueness can not be checked for index tid=(%u,%u) in index "%s"

details.expr: "It doesn't have visible heap tids and key is equal to the tid=(%u,%u)%s (points to heap tid=(%u,%u))."
details.text: It doesn't have visible heap tids and key is equal to the tid=(%u,%u)%s (points to heap tid=(%u,%u)).

hints.expr: "VACUUM the table and repeat the check."
hints.text: VACUUM the table and repeat the check.

call:
ereport(DEBUG1,
				(errcode(ERRCODE_NO_DATA),
				 errmsg("index uniqueness can not be checked for index tid=(%u,%u) in index \"%s\"",
						targetblock, offset,
						RelationGetRelationName(state->rel)),
				 errdetail("It doesn't have visible heap tids and key is equal to the tid=(%u,%u)%s (points to heap tid=(%u,%u)).",
						   lVis->blkno, lVis->offset, posting,
						   ItemPointerGetBlockNumberNoCheck(lVis->tid),
						   ItemPointerGetOffsetNumberNoCheck(lVis->tid)),
				 errhint("VACUUM the table and repeat the check.")))

message.expr: "index tuple size does not equal lp_len in index \"%s\""
message.text: index tuple size does not equal lp_len in index "%s"

details.expr: "Index tid=(%u,%u) tuple size=%zu lp_len=%u page lsn=%X/%08X."
details.text: Index tid=(%u,%u) tuple size=%zu lp_len=%u page lsn=%X/%08X.

hints.expr: "This could be a torn page problem."
hints.text: This could be a torn page problem.

call:
ereport(ERROR,
					(errcode(ERRCODE_INDEX_CORRUPTED),
					 errmsg("index tuple size does not equal lp_len in index \"%s\"",
							RelationGetRelationName(state->rel)),
					 errdetail_internal("Index tid=(%u,%u) tuple size=%zu lp_len=%u page lsn=%X/%08X.",
										state->targetblock, offset,
										tupsize, ItemIdGetLength(itemid),
										LSN_FORMAT_ARGS(state->targetlsn)),
					 errhint("This could be a torn page problem.")))
